name: AERL C Framework
description: A beginner-friendly HAL framework for embedded systems and robotics. One header, one ready-made global object (no setup boilerplate), non-blocking timing (glow/flash/glctrl), run-once/run-N control, unified logging, and UART/I2C/SPI helpers. Works right beside Arduino.h.

authors.name: AERL - Applied Electronics and Robotics Laboratory LLP
